column1: Hey Emiliano, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
Yea i'll be in punta cana too actually
how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
cool which school we from? ill hook it up with a good group rate
Trinity University, from San Antonio, TX
Word love San Antonio! will def hook it up for y'all
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
we are still sorting some stuff out
but would try to get things booked soonish
but wouldn't expect anything sooner than a week, or week and a half, knowing the group I'm traveling with
I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
Is it cool if I send through email? It's a little long for next
yea, a good email is emiaguilar137@gmail.com
I'll most likely first present the plan to the group, and if I get an okay, then move forward with the deposit and everything else
okay dope! one sec gonna send this now
just sent that over lmk if it came through
hey that email ever come through?
are there any events planned outside the resort? or is it just everything inside?
yea we have our off resort party pass that comes with express entry, open bar, and cover charge at our nightclub hosted events off of the resort! theyre pretty dope
Punta Cana has Imagine Cave, Coco bongo, and Maroca Club. Cancun has D'Cave, Rakata, Mandala, Vaquita, and a few more
the open bar booze cruise is pretty lit too
hey checkin in, we narrow down on which option we wanna roll with?
we are still looking at it, everyone was kinda out of town for MLK
yea all good! just lmk which we leaning towards
is the party pass and the booze cruise already included in the price you sent me?
nah those are separate add ons
How much would it be with both of them?
for Punta Cana? we have a 3 event bundle package for $200
you could do 2 nightclub events and a booze cruise with that
yea the above. Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca Club are the 3 nightclub options. And then the booze cruise
I'll let them know, but most likely would add that
Is there any other add ons?
travel protection insurance. and also while on site you can add like ATVs, Snorkeling, Tours, things like that. its all available to book at the excursions desk on the resort
yoo whats up! how we lookin for spring break?
sup! we still lookin to get situated for spring break?
at the end, the girls of my group decided to go with a family agent so couldn't win the pitch
although I was wondering if it was possible getting the party bundle with u
It's all good! And yea potentially. Which resort will you be staying on?
hey which resort are you staying at?
okay bet. we can still def get you the party pass options. did you want to do the 3 event pass?
would the pass include transportation and drinks?
I just talked to them and all of them would be interested in getting the party pass, we are 11
Okay dope I got you. Next step is for me to set up the reservation portal for the 11 party passes and you each will be able to slot in and make your own payments
Was everyone ready to make their payment today?
hey did we wanna lock that in?
Sorry, we are still looking at some stuff regarding flights and once we have that figure out, I'll let u know
Or if we decide to do it, what's the process? To see if I can start helping u to set it up

okay word. yea like I mentioned above we just needa decide on how many nights out we wanna do, and how many ppl want it. from there I set up the reservation link for you all for x amount of party passes. everyone goes in and secures their own
It would be two nights out with the booze cruise, and it would be 11 of us
what dates are you out there?
im going from the 10th to the 15
just lmk when the group wants to get things set up and ill set up the link for everyone!
I think all of us are ready?
ok dope, we wanted the 2 nights out and the booze cruise right?
word did we know which 2 club events we wanted to do? I def recommend imagine cave and coco bongo, those are the 2 most popular
its called Maroca, its an outdoor night club super dope, like a nightime beach vibe
ok ok, let me ask them to make sure
I think we will be picking Maroca and Imagine Cave
bet! will send this over in a sec
here this is for you guys https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/share/XBBDUW9G7D
lmk if anyone needs help navigating it
hey were you guys able to hop on that res?
sup E were y'all still lookin for the party pass reservation or not anymore?
Sorry, I've been working and haven't had time
I'll do mine tn, and push the others to start paying
hey checkin in, we hear from the rest of the group? a bunch of open slots still
Just send a text to the gc
I'll put some pressure to get it done soon
word yea just don't want ppl forgetting and then they can't grab it later on lol
hey checkin in, everyone is all good to go, just one tba left! did you have someone else joining ?
Let me check with them if someone is missing to pay
Cause I think I counted properly
yea looks like Isabella is the last one that still has a balance to pay
Hi, I know all of us have already paid and excited for the trip, just wanted to ask if our party pass lets us go to the clubs any night? Or is it scheduled? And same w the booze cruise?
hey whats up! the events are pre scheduled nights where we send all of our travelers to each venue
Maroca, I'm going to double check I see it on the 9th but there may be a 2nd date on the 12th or 13th just gonna double confirm
We get there on the 10th, so we might need that second night
Right, you have Maroca as the 2nd night at the moment so just want to make sure it lines up with your dates. Otherwise we can swap for Coco Bongo on the 11th
Do you know when would it be decided about a second night?
Would y'all be cool with doing coco bongo?
I'll ask everyone else from my group but we should be okay with the change
But let me confirm with them
bet just lmk! if not we'll work something out
thanks, I'll try and get back to u with a definite answer by the end of the day
okay cool yea just let me know
Is the date for Maroca the only one? Cause I'm talking to them and they would still prefer Maroca

At the moment thats the only night we're hosting at Maroca. there may be other nights that its open though. the on site staff will have a better judgement at the desk as to what the full options are when you redeem your passes
right now, lets have you keep the maroca pass, and if they can work it out at the desk for y'all, then perfect. if not, they'll give you another option, or coco bongo
I'll actually be headed to Punta Cana friday and have a better judgement on the potential other open Maroca dates
Yoyo checkin in you all good?
Emiliano what's up bro, you guys all good over there?
yoo E the bus for Coco Bongo leaves at 9, the vans out there ready for y'all
